header.description: Interact with Google Gemini AI models

analyze.description: Take in videos and answer questions about them

upload.description: Upload a file to the Google Gemini API for later use

createStore.description: Create a new File Search store for RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)

listStores.description: List all File Search stores owned by the user

uploadToStore.description: Upload a file to a File Search store for RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)

generate.description: Creates a video from a text prompt

edit.description: Upload one or more images and apply edits based on a prompt

message.description: Create a completion with Google Gemini model

download.description: Download a generated video from the Google Gemini API using a URL

audioUrls.description: URL(s) of the audio(s) to transcribe, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

binaryPropertyName.description: Name of the binary field(s) which contains the video(s), seperate multiple field names with commas

simplify.description: Whether to simplify the response or not

maxOutputTokens.description: Fewer tokens will result in shorter, less detailed video description

startTime.description: The start time of the audio in MM:SS or HH:MM:SS format

endTime.description: The end time of the audio in MM:SS or HH:MM:SS format

includeMergedResponse.description: Whether to include a single output string merging all text parts of the response

systemMessage.placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful assistant

codeExecution.description: Whether to allow the model to execute code it generates to produce a response. Supported only by certain models.

frequencyPenalty.description: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim

candidateCount.description: How many completions to generate for each prompt

presencePenalty.description: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics

temperature.description: Controls the randomness of the output. Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive

topP.description: The maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling

topK.description: The maximum number of tokens to consider when sampling

thinkingBudget.description: Controls reasoning tokens for thinking models. Set to 0 to disable automatic thinking. Set to -1 for dynamic thinking. Leave empty for auto mode.

maxToolsIterations.description: The maximum number of tool iteration cycles the LLM will run before stopping. A single iteration can contain multiple tool calls. Set to 0 for no limit

durationSeconds.description: Length of the generated video in seconds. Supported only by certain models.

16:9.description: Most common aspect ratio for televisions and monitors

9:16.description: Popular for short-form videos like YouTube Shorts

dont_allow.description: Prevent generation of people in the video

allow_adult.description: Allow generation of adult people in the video

allow_all.description: Allow generation of all people in the video

documentUrls.description: URL(s) of the document(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

fileUrl.description: URL of the file to upload

displayName.description: A human-readable name for the file (will be visible in citations)

fileSearchStoreName.description: The full name of the File Search store to upload to (format: fileSearchStores/...)

force.description: Whether to delete related Documents and objects. If false, deletion will fail if the store contains any Documents.

pageSize.description: Maximum number of File Search stores to return per page (max 20)

pageToken.description: Token from a previous page to retrieve the next page of results

imageUrls.description: URL(s) of the image(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

prompt.description: A text description of the desired video
prompt.placeholder: e.g. Panning wide shot of a calico kitten sleeping in the sunshine

images.description: Add one or more binary fields to include images with your prompt

binaryPropertyName.description: The name of the binary field containing the image data
The name of the binary field containing the image data

content.description: The content of the message to be send
content.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

role.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

user.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

model.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality

content.description: The content of the message to be send
content.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

role.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

user.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

model.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality

jsonOutput.description: Whether to attempt to return the response in JSON format

googleSearch.description: Whether to allow the model to search the web using Google Search to get real-time information

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate for location-based queries

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate for location-based queries

urlContext.description: Whether to allow the model to read and analyze content from specific URLs

fileSearchStoreNames.description: The file search store names to use for the file search. File search stores are managed via Google AI Studio.

metadataFilter.description: Use metadata filter to search within a subset of documents. Example: author="Robert Graves".

codeExecution.description: Whether to allow the model to execute code it generates to produce a response. Supported only by certain models.

videoUrls.description: URL(s) of the video(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

url.description: The URL from Google Gemini API to download the video from

returnAs.description: Whether to return the video as a binary file or a URL that can be used to download the video later
